# RAPath Bangladesh

> Bangladesh DGDA Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for Bangladesh DGDA medical device regulation — Class A–D registration, local authorized representative, and the Drug and Cosmetics Act 2023.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Getting Started](https://rapath.org/bd/getting-started/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Classification](https://rapath.org/bd/classification/overview)
- [Registration](https://rapath.org/bd/registration/overview)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/bd/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/bd/legislation/overview)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/bd/whats-new/recent-changes)

## Official Sources

- [Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA)](https://www.dgda.gov.bd/)
- [Ministry of Health & Family Welfare](https://mohfw.gov.bd/)

## About RAPath

- [All Jurisdictions](https://rapath.org/#jurisdictions)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/whats-new)

- [Terms of Use](https://rapath.org/terms)
- [Q&A / Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/RAPath/discussions)
